About Me

Creator. Builder.
Problem Solver.

Hey! I'm Abhinav Pratap Singh, a 12th-grade learner from Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, deeply into the intersection of media and technology.

I explore new tools and software obsessively — whether that's web development, Python scripting, or creative tools like Premiere Pro and After Effects. I'm comfortable with complex interfaces and I figure things out quickly rather than relying on step-by-step instructions.

I'm currently building BringItUp, a small digital assistance agency where I'm learning how to turn technical and creative skills into real solutions for clients — from websites to branding to design.
